items.title: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
items.dek: Ernest Bai Koroma was arrested in 2023 after gunmen broke into an armoury and some jails, freeing inmates.
items.body: Ernest Bai Koroma was arrested in 2023 after gunmen broke into an armoury and some jails, freeing inmates.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Celebrations as Gibraltar-Spain border fence removed
items.dek: The symbolic midnight ceremony was followed by large crowds crossing between Gibraltar and Spain without border checks.
items.body: The symbolic midnight ceremony was followed by large crowds crossing between Gibraltar and Spain without border checks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Three killed as Russian bombing of Odesa continues
items.dek: In recent days, Russia and Ukraine have launched attacks on each others' infrastructure for shipping goods.
items.body: In recent days, Russia and Ukraine have launched attacks on each others' infrastructure for shipping goods.
items.author: IriLine Desk
